# ParagonNodeComponent.ImageHandle property

The component's atlas frame handle. `0` ⇒ a runtime-filled slot (e.g. `Node_Icon` → the node's `HIconMask`) — drawn, not dropped, so the program is complete.

```csharp
public uint ImageHandle { get; set; }
```
